overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic cityscape at dusk, featuring holographic koi fish swimming between towering skyscrapers adorned with neon advertisements. The camera slowly pans left across the urban canyon from a high balcony vantage point, capturing atmospheric haze and vibrant artificial lighting while flying vehicles occasionally pass through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise corporate canyon with holographic art installation

events.description: camera tilts upward from street level to focus on the central tower and holographic fish
holographic fish begin circling each other in a synchronized pattern

agents.ego_description: standing on a high balcony ledge observing the cityscape and holographic displays

entered.detail: large translucent blue holographic fish swimming in mid-air between buildings
large translucent orange-red holographic fish swimming alongside the blue one
tall dark building with grid-patterned windows and red accent lights
massive black skyscraper with illuminated windows and circular corporate logo near top
tall building with vertical strip lighting and multiple advertisement screens
multi-level street visible far below with moving traffic lights and vehicles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view down a futuristic city canyon at dusk, showing two large holographic koi fish swimming between massive skyscrapers. The camera slowly tilts up from the street level below to focus on the illuminated central tower and the circling holographic projections, establishing the cyberpunk atmosphere with neon lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with floating holographic sculptures

events.description: flying vehicle passes through the canyon from right to left in the distance
holographic fish complete half a circle and swap relative positions

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan the view leftward, tracking the movement of the holographic fish

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally through the city canyon from right to left

entered.detail: tall illuminated billboard showing a woman in red attire
illuminated corporate symbol on the central tower facade

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the right building exits the frame while the central corporate tower with its circular logo becomes more prominent. The holographic fish circle each other in the middle of the canyon, and a flying vehicle passes through the scene. The left skyscraper moves closer, revealing large vertical advertisement screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial advertising district with large-format digital displays

events.description: view shifts focus from central tower to the left building's advertisement screens
second flying vehicle appears in the distance moving leftward

agents.ego_description: panning left to focus on the detailed advertisements covering the left skyscraper

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying a woman in white clothing
digital billboard showing a male figure with text overlay
cluster of various illuminated signs and brand logos on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the left skyscraper as the central tower exits the frame rightward. The holographic fish swim toward the right side of the frame while the camera reveals detailed neon advertisements on the left building, including large screens displaying human figures. The view becomes more enclosed as the camera faces the left building directly, with flying vehicles occasionally passing in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a wide view of a futuristic city canyon to a focused perspective on a neon-drenched skyscraper. It begins by tilting up from the street level at dusk, capturing two large holographic koi fish swimming between massive towers amidst a thick atmospheric haze. As the camera pans left, the central corporate tower and its circular logo become prominent while a flying vehicle glides through the space between the circling holographic projections. The scene then shifts as the central tower exits the frame, bringing the camera closer to the left skyscraper and its towering vertical advertisement screens. Finally, the view becomes more enclosed, focusing directly on the detailed neon displays of human figures while the holographic fish drift away toward the right.
